parsed.production_notes: Simple digital graphic. Consists entirely of text on a solid background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid yellow background. There are no photographic elements, subjects, or props present. The entire visual space is a uniform color.

scenes.visual_description: A solid yellow square graphic filled with bold, black, capitalized text. The text is center-aligned and takes up almost the entire frame. The design is minimalist, relying entirely on typography and high-contrast colors to convey urgency.
scenes.on_screen_text: WE ARE LOOKING FOR 50 VOLUNTEERS WHO NEED TO BREAK THE LANGUAGE BARRIER THIS MONTH. NO BORING TEXTBOOKS. NO GRAMMAR DRILLS. JUST 10 MINS OF DAILY AI NEW GROUP STARTS MONDAY. LAST CALL.
